seoTitle: Lake Illawarra vs Lake Macquarie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Illawarra and Lake Macquarie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Illawarra vs Lake Macquarie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Illawarra and Lake Macquarie.
heading: Lake Illawarra vs Lake Macquarie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Illawarra, New South Wales and Lake Macquarie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Illawarra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Lake Macquarie (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Illawarra or Lake Macquarie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Illawarra has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Lake Macquarie scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Illawarra scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Macquarie scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Illawarra or Lake Macquarie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Illawarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
